description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MSYS that runs on pull requests and pushes to the master branch, and can be triggered manually. The workflow has two jobs, build_gcc_cmake and build_gcc_meson, both running on a windows-2025 environment with MSYS2. Each job checks out the repository, sets up MSYS/MINGW64, and then configures, builds, and tests a project using either cmake or meson.
